rationale: CRUD spec says new drivers should NOT implement deprecated Count; Go driver still exposes it publicly.
maxAwaitTimeMS not sent correctly on wire; change streams spec requires this option to be forwarded properly.
Panic on nil argument to Disconnect; input validation implementation bug, no specific spec rule about nil handling.
GridFS spec allows any BSON type for file _id; driver only accepts ObjectIDs in upload/download functions.
Race condition in Server String() accessing unprotected fields; internal concurrency bug, no spec rule violated.
GSSAPI auth starts SASL with empty payload violating SASL spec RFC4752; broke in MongoDB 4.0 which passes empty payload to Kerberos.
Removing public exposure of internal 'x' package types from options API; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
Adding TLSConfig as a client option; API ergonomics improvement, not related to a spec conformance requirement.
Internal cleanup of mongo.newClient function cruft; internal refactor with no spec-defined behavior change.
'All other drivers seem to have interpreted it as 255KiB'; Go driver uses 255kB, filed to align with other drivers.
Creating mongo.CommandError wrapper to hide internal x/ package type; API design improvement, child of GODRIVER-793.
Documentation improvement for nil handling in TransformDocument; docs-only change with no spec conformance issue.
GoDoc for mongo.Client doesn't match changed API; documentation bug with no spec behavior involved.
Authentication regression from GODRIVER-803 fix causing keyfile auth to fail; regression bug not a spec rule violation.
Discussion about alternative Go import path; packaging/distribution concern, no spec involvement.
Documentation out of date after API change to connection handling; docs bug, no spec conformance issue.
BSON datetime marshaled as Unix milliseconds integer instead of RFC3339 string in extended JSON; Extended JSON spec violation.
GridFS spec requires {files_id:1, n:1} chunks index to be unique; driver creates it without unique constraint.
zLib compressor has multiple implementation bugs (empty slice return, race conditions); internal implementation bugs, no specific spec rule violated.
Retryable writes spec requires only the failed batch to be retried; driver retries entire operation on batch splits.
Extended JSON spec requires ObjectID to be quoted string in $oid; driver outputs unquoted value.
GridFS spec allows any BSON type for file ID; hard cast to ObjectID panics on non-ObjectID values in OpenDownloadStream.
Nil pointer dereference when UploadOptions has Metadata but no Registry; implementation bug in options constructor, no spec rule.
BSON regex skipping fails to find null byte for options; BSON spec defines regex encoding with null-terminated options string.
BSON unmarshaling fails with 'unknown BSON type invalid' when document contains regex type; BSON spec regex type must be handled.
Typo 'Avergage RTT' in Server String() output; trivial documentation/string typo fix, no spec behavior involved.
GridFS spec says drivers MUST handle length/chunkSize stored as any numeric type; driver panics on Int32, mentions Python stores Int32.
Data race in Handshake.Decode shared across connections; concurrency/implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Panic when calling Watch on unconnected client instead of returning error; input validation bug, no spec-defined panic behavior.
MergeClientOptions suppresses errors from ApplyURI; error handling implementation bug, no specific spec rule about option merging.
Distinct with nil filter doesn't execute; likely user misuse (unexported fields), resolved as Done not Fixed, no spec rule about nil filter.
Unknown server can be selected if goroutine updating topology hasn't run; concurrency/race condition, no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
Documentation improvement for Docker DNS issue; docs-only change, no spec conformance issue.
BSON marshaller ignores embedded struct fields; Go-specific struct handling behavior, resolved as Done not Fixed suggesting user error.
time.Location set to zero value vs nil; Go-specific behavior difference from mgo, not contradicting BSON spec datetime requirement.
GoDoc example uses removed DecodeBytes method; documentation bug after cursor redesign, no spec conformance issue.
Legacy Find ignores limit, returning multiples of batchSize instead; CRUD spec requires limit to constrain returned documents.
Feature request to expose UpdatedExisting field from findAndModify result; API ergonomics improvement, no spec conformance issue.
User reports fields not stored; likely unexported struct fields (Go convention), resolved as Done not Fixed, no spec issue.
BulkWrite doesn't report write concern errors in BulkWriteException; CRUD spec requires write concern errors to be reported.
Docs incorrectly suggest negative limits work; misleading documentation about find command behavior, mentions mgo as context, not a spec rule violation.
Adding support for wildcardProjection index option in MongoDB 4.1.8; new feature implementation, not a spec conformance bug.
Extended JSON date parser fails for dates after year 2262 due to UnixNano overflow; BSON Extended JSON spec requires correct date parsing.
Upgrading CI testing to Go 1.12; build/CI infrastructure change, no spec behavior involved.
SingleResult.Decode only works once; API usability improvement, no spec rule requiring idempotent Decode behavior.
Decoding to nil pointer panics instead of returning error; input validation implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
Internal architectural discussion about where to retrieve server description during dispatch; design discussion, no spec issue.
Nil pointer dereference in ChangeStream.Next during KillCursors; crash/implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Write concern errors missing codeName field; spec requires codeName to be recorded from server writeConcernError response.
Removing unused registry field from topology.Server after GODRIVER-3; dead code cleanup, no spec behavior involved.
